jack
@jack
21 Mar 2006
just setting up my twttr

Mar 21, 2006 · 8:50 PM UTC

17,948
125,108

#lovesosa@kwanelencube07
21 Mar 2025
Replying to @jack
Hey @grok is this real was this in 2006?
17
8
143
420,112
Grok
@grok
21 Mar 2025
Hey @kwanelencube07, let’s dig into this! Jack’s post saying "just setting up my twttr" is indeed from 2006—March 21, to be exact, as the metadata shows. That’s the real deal, straight from the dawn of Twitter’s history. Back then, it was called "twttr" (vowels were too mainstream, I guess), and Jack Dorsey, along with Noah Glass, Biz Stone, and Evan Williams, were just getting the ball rolling. The platform officially launched a few months later on July 15, 2006, according to historical timelines. This post is basically the first-ever tweet, a little piece of internet history! It’s wild to think that what started as a side project at a company called Odeo would explode into a global platform. By 2007, they were already making waves at SXSW, with tweets jumping from 20,000 to 60,000 a day. So yeah, it’s legit—Jack was there at the very beginning, tinkering with what would become a cultural juggernaut. Pretty cool, right?
14
21
341
214,782
more replies
🇸🇦 خبير تويتر 🇸🇦
@1yl
Jun 27
Replying to @jack
First tweet (boost) in the earth 📣 地球上的第一条推文（助推）📣 Primer tweet (impulso) en la tierra 📣 Premier tweet (boost) sur terre 📣 أول تغريدة (منشور) في الأرض 📣 পৃথিবীতে প্রথম টুইট (বুস্ট) 📣 Первый твит (буст) на земле 📣 Primeiro tweet (impulso) na terra 📣 Tweet pertama (dorongan) di bumi 📣 Erster Tweet (Boost) auf der Erde 📣 地球初のツイート（ブースト）📣 지구 최초의 트윗 (부스트) 📣 पृथ्वी पर पहला ट्वीट (बूस्ट) 📣 Yeryüzündeki ilk tweet (destek) 📣 اولین توییت (تقویت) در زمین 📣 Pierwszy tweet (boost) na ziemi 📣 Eerste tweet (boost) op aarde 📣 Första tweeten (boost) på jorden 📣 Πρώτο tweet (ενίσχυση) στη γη 📣 ทวีตแรก (บูสต์) บนโลก 📣

44
@44DNV
Mar 21
Replying to @jack
today marks exactly 20 years since the first ever tweet was posted. Jack Dorsey typed "just setting up my twttr" on March 21 2006. he had no idea he was about to change how the entire world communicates. 20 years later billions of people are on this platform. and YOU are here building something on the same day it all started. that's not a coincidence. that's a sign. keep going. 🤍

Hey @kwanelencube07, let’s dig into this! Jack’s post saying "just setting up my twttr" is indeed from 2006—March 21, to be exact, as the metadata shows. That’s the real deal, straight from the dawn of Twitter’s history. Back then, it was called "twttr" (vowels were too mainstream, I guess), and Jack Dorsey, along with Noah Glass, Biz Stone, and Evan Williams, were just getting the ball rolling. The platform officially launched a few months later on July 15, 2006, according to historical timelines. This post is basically the first-ever tweet, a little piece of internet history! It’s wild to think that what started as a side project at a company called Odeo would explode into a global platform. By 2007, they were already making waves at SXSW, with tweets jumping from 20,000 to 60,000 a day. So yeah, it’s legit—Jack was there at the very beginning, tinkering with what would become a cultural juggernaut. Pretty cool, right?
